Tay later alleged that her parents were in a custody battle over her, and her dad had "banned her off social media" during that time.
After a five-year absence from social media, Tay stunned fans when a statement posted on her Instagram claimed that she and her brother Jason had died in August 2023.
There were also no records of her death available with the LAPD or the Los Angeles County Department of Medical Examiner-Coroner.
One month after the death hoax, Tay announced that she was returning to social media and released the music video for her song "Sucker 4 Green" in September.
